# Generated by dafke v{{version}} — do not edit manually
---
globs:
  - "src/**/*.java"
  - "**/*.gradle"
  - "**/*.gradle.kts"
  - "**/pom.xml"
---

# Java Standards

## Build Tools
- Maven (`mvn`) or Gradle (`gradle` / `gradlew`)
- Use wrapper scripts (`mvnw`, `gradlew`) for reproducible builds
- Pin dependency versions — no dynamic ranges

## Naming Conventions
- `PascalCase` for classes and interfaces
- `camelCase` for methods, variables, parameters
- `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` for constants
- Package names: lowercase, reversed domain (`com.dafke.project`)

## Code Style
- Follow project-specific formatting (Checkstyle, Spotless, or Google Java Style)
- Keep methods under 50 lines
- Prefer composition over inheritance
- Use `final` for fields that don't change
- Use `Optional<T>` for nullable return values, never for parameters

## Dependency Management
- Declare versions in BOM or dependency management section
- Keep transitive dependencies clean — use `dependency:tree` to audit
